Precondition: box_1 is on top of box_2 and both end effectors are free.
Postcondition: The robot is holding box_1 with both end effectors.

Precondition: The robot holds box_1 with both end effectors and the area behind box_2 on the table is free.
Postcondition: box_1 is placed on the table behind box_2 and both end effectors are released.

Precondition: box_2 is accessible on the table and both end effectors are free.
Postcondition: The robot is holding box_2 with both end effectors.
